title: Playgrounds
sampleHint: Pre-built graphs that show how multi-agent conversations work. Confirm Local (Ollama) under Providers, then press Run.
sampleHintRemote: Samples default to Ollama on localhost — run the app with <1>npm run dev</1>, or switch agents to a public HTTPS provider.
loadSampleMessage: Load "{{name}}"? Your current playground will be replaced.
deleteMessage: Delete playground "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
